Sanitized claude-code transcript excerpt — fspec (Spec-Driven Multi-Agent Coding Factory).

user: Install fspec globally. Run `npm install -g @sengac/fspec`.
assistant: Installed. Reference: https://github.com/sengac/fspec and https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sengac/fspec.
user: Bootstrap the workspace.
assistant: Running fspec init to scaffold the spec-driven workflow. The /fspec slash command bootstraps Claude Code integration.
assistant: For Codex, the bootstrap is /prompts:fspec.
user: Show the kanban board.
assistant: Running fspec to open the interactive kanban over the Gherkin scenarios and TDD checkpoints.
user: Something broke; restore the last checkpoint.
assistant: Running fspec restore-checkpoint to roll back to the most recent auto checkpoint. If needed, fspec report-bug-to-github opens an upstream issue.
assistant: Package reference: "@sengac/fspec" in devDependencies, https://npmjs.com/package/@sengac/fspec.
